title: teucrium cincinnatum var. ghikae
intro: Teucrium cincinnatum var. ghikae, also known as the Balkan germander, is a type of herbaceous plant belonging to the mint family Lamiaceae. It has been traditionally used in medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to soothe digestive issues and protect against cell damage. The health benefits of Balkan germander include its ability to reduce anxiety and stress, improve cognitive function, and support the immune system. The plant is typically prepared as a tea or tincture, and can also be used in herbal infusions and capsules, although its use should be supervised by a healthcare professional due to potential liver toxicity concerns.
